lyrics.text: When I see you
looking back at me
Watching this eye still
through your fingers
and your eyes
have told a thousand lies
but I can't tell this time
that you really mean it
We've been crossing the wire
and still no spark
lost and tired, falling apart
we've been together for forever tell me why why why
lyrics.translation: 我们曾说要永远在一起告诉我为什么

lyrics.text: Did we have to turn around and say goodbye bye bye
lyrics.translation: 我们真的要转身对彼此说再见吗

lyrics.text: and the only thing that's left to do is cry cry cry
lyrics.translation: 而且我唯一剩下能做的事情就是哭泣

lyrics.text: nothing left for me to say to you but bye bye bye
lyrics.translation: 除了再见之外我不能再说些什么

lyrics.text: I can sing another broken song
lyrics.translation: 我可以唱一首伤心的歌曲

lyrics.text: trying to hold on to your picture.
out of face
you hide behind your face
it's more than I can take
I know you run deeper
We've been crossing the wire
and still no spark
lost and tired, falling apart
we've been together for forever tell me why why why
lyrics.translation: 我们曾说要永远在一起告诉我为什么

lyrics.text: you left me hanging on the light
lyrics.translation: 你带走了我赖以生存的光芒

lyrics.text: why you stealing all my time
lyrics.translation: 为什么你还要偷走我的时间

lyrics.text: you take a piece of me
you've been driving too slow
so I gotta let you go
before you break me em~yeah~
we've been together for forever tell me why why why
